metadata.description: Pay-per-use API skills for Claude Code — web scraping, search, social media, crypto/DeFi, media generation, and security through the Obul proxy.

plugins.name: obul-core
plugins.description: Infrastructure, proxy, IPFS storage, and file conversion

plugins.name: obul-scrape
plugins.description: Web scraping & extraction via Firecrawl, Browserbase, Zyte, Minifetch, and x402engine

plugins.name: obul-search
plugins.description: Web search via Firecrawl, Exa neural search, and GEO visibility tracking

plugins.name: obul-social
plugins.description: Social media data from X/Twitter, Farcaster, and Reddit

plugins.name: obul-crypto
plugins.description: Blockchain & DeFi — market data, portfolio analytics, smart money, DeFi actions, AML screening

plugins.name: obul-media
plugins.description: Image gen, video gen, music gen, TTS, and transcription

plugins.name: obul-security
plugins.description: Security & risk intelligence via Orac and BlackSwan

plugins.name: obul-leads
plugins.description: People & company enrichment, LinkedIn lookup, email verification, social enrichment, and places search via StableEnrich
